prerequisites: A Toggl Track account with access to the data you want to extract.
A Toggl Track API token from your profile settings (maps to the required api_token field).
The numeric organization_id of the Toggl Track organization you want to read from.
The numeric workspace_id of the Toggl Track workspace you want to read from.
A start_date and end_date defining the date window for time-bounded data (for example report and time-entry records).

authMethods.name: API token (HTTP Basic Auth)
authMethods.summary: Toggl Track authenticates with a personal API token. The token is sent using HTTP Basic Auth, with the API token as the username and the literal string "api_token" as the password. Provide this token in the connector's required api_token secret field. The token is available on your Toggl Track profile settings page.

setupSteps.title: Get your Toggl Track API token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Toggl Track and open your profile settings. Copy your personal API token from the API token section. This token authenticates all API requests via HTTP Basic Auth, using the token as the username and the literal string "api_token" as the password.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API token
setupSteps.body: Enter the copied token into the connector's required api_token field. Keep it secret; it grants access to your Toggl Track data.

setupSteps.title: Identify your organization and workspace
setupSteps.body: Set organization_id to the numeric ID of your Toggl Track organization and workspace_id to the numeric ID of the workspace you want to extract from. Both fields are required.

setupSteps.title: Set the date window
setupSteps.body: Provide start_date and end_date to bound the time period of the data to extract. Both fields are required and define the window the connector reads over.

setupSteps.title: Validate the connection
setupSteps.body: Run a connection check so the connector authenticates against the Toggl Track API with your token and confirms the configured organization and workspace are reachable before syncing.
